from source import find_in_sorted
import pytest

def test_find_in_sorted_last_element():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 7
    expected_index = 4
    assert find_in_sorted(arr, target) == expected_index, f"Expected find_in_sorted({arr}, {target}) to return {expected_index}, but got {find_in_sorted(arr, target)}"

from source import find_in_sorted
import pytest

def test_find_in_sorted_last_element():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    x = 7
    with pytest.raises(RecursionError):
        find_in_sorted(arr, x)
